etymology.description: Depicts a left hand -> stylized as a component in characters like γ¹Α(γ¹Α) (huΡΪ, "ash")
etymology.interpretation: This character represents a left hand, and it is visually similar to the component used in γ¹Α(γ¹Α) (huΡΪ, "ash"), where a left hand is an element of the character.
